commands.repair_reason: This needs contributor or maintainer action for real behavior proof and security-check triage; automation should not repair the branch while the external proof gate is failing.; Needs attention: The diff itself only changes prompt/test text, but exact-head security audit checks are failing and need triage before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Add the required changelog entry — src/auto-reply/reply/groups.ts:248-252 (sha=2aedee06f9039a99df6260f57b1c5b27df5811e8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Discord-only group chat prompt hint telling agents to wrap bare URLs in angle brackets and extends the group context tests for that prompt behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main builds Discord group prompt context without any URL/embed suppression hint, and Discord contexts set `Provider: "discord"`. I did not live-run Discord delivery in this read-only review.
